mapper.sql: id, household_id, name, definition, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_templates (household_id, name, definition, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{householdId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{definition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM report_templates WHERE household_id = #{householdId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
